component.name: BlogsApiTask
component.script:
function init() m.top.functionName = "GetBlogs" end function
sub GetBlogs() url = m.top.apiUrl if url = invalid or url = "" then print "Invalid API URL" return end if
http = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") http.SetUrl(url) http.SetCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.InitClientCertificates() http.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json") http.AddHeader("Accept", "application/json") response = http.GetToString() if response = invalid or response = "" then print "Failed to get response from API" return end if
parsed = ParseJson(response) if parsed = invalid then print "Failed to parse JSON response" return end if
if Type(parsed) = "roArray" then m.top.result = parsed print "Successfully parsed " + parsed.Count().ToStr() + " items" else print "Parsed data is not an array, it's a: " + Type(parsed) end if end sub
